summary: Iteration 4 testing completed successfully. All PRIORITY features verified working: Available moments endpoint now returns 81 moments (was only 9), auto-generation fills entire validity period, AanmeldPUNT branding applied throughout app.
passed_tests: PRIORITY: GET /api/study-moments/available returns 81 moments (was only 9 before) - VERIFIED
PRIORITY: Available moments have dates until June 2026 - VERIFIED
POST /api/study-moments/generate with empty body {} generates for full rule period - VERIFIED
Available moments include registrations array with studentName and className - VERIFIED
Available moments include full/vol moments (not filtered out) - VERIFIED
GET /api/notifications/absence-feed returns feed items - VERIFIED
PATCH /api/notifications/{id}/read marks notification as read - VERIFIED
DELETE /api/users/{id} - superadmin can hard-delete users - VERIFIED
GET /api/users returns user list for admin - VERIFIED
GET /api/availability-rules returns active rules with validity periods - VERIFIED
Superadmin login works (joachim.vaneckenrode@rhizo.be) - VERIFIED
AanmeldPUNT branding on Login page (2 occurrences) - VERIFIED
AanmeldPUNT branding in Sidebar - VERIFIED
Available Studies page shows 81 momenten beschikbaar - VERIFIED
Available Studies page shows expandable registrations list with INGESCHREVEN header - VERIFIED
Available Studies page shows registered student names and class names - VERIFIED
Admin Users page has delete buttons for superadmin - VERIFIED (3 delete buttons, none for self)
Admin Users page has edit buttons (4 total) - VERIFIED
Availability admin page has Generate Moments button - VERIFIED
Generate dialog shows dates as OPTIONAL (Van datum/Tot datum optioneel) - VERIFIED
Generate dialog shows instruction 'Laat datums leeg om momenten te genereren voor de volledige geldigheidsperiode' - VERIFIED

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI features verified working via Playwright)

seed_data_creation: None needed - existing data used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All priority features from iteration 4 tested and verified. Key achievements: (1) Available moments now returns 81 instead of 9 - auto-generation fills entire validity period when rules are created/updated. (2) Generate button works without dates (uses full rule period). (3) AanmeldPUNT branding confirmed throughout. (4) Superadmin can hard-delete users. (5) Absence feed endpoint works. (6) Available studies page shows expandable registered student list per moment.

mocked_apis.Email sending: Email functionality is MOCKED (non-functional) as documented

key_verification_notes.priority_fix_verified: Available moments endpoint now returns 81 moments (was 9 before). Dates extend from current date to June 2026.
key_verification_notes.auto_generation: Moments are auto-generated when availability rules are created or updated
key_verification_notes.full_moments_included: Full/vol moments are no longer filtered out from available list
key_verification_notes.registrations_visible: Each moment shows registered students with names and class names in expandable list
